zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hewster於1447年出生在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨時，她的父親Humphrey Hewster27歲，母親Joan de Burton22歲。她於1464年與John Goring III在英國英格蘭素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年在英國倫敦享年50歲，埋葬在英國素可登可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hewster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: topographic name meaning ‘beech tree’ (see   Hester   1), or a habitational name from any of several places so named, particularly in North Rhine-Westphalia.

variants.name: Hiester
meanings: probably a habitational name from a place so named near Celle.

variants.name: Hester
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous beech tree, Middle Low German hēster, Middle High German heister ‘young tree (especially beech or oak)’. Compare Heister .
English: variant of Easter with prosthetic H-.

Irish (Mayo and Roscommon): possibly a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistir ‘descendant of Oistir’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. However, without any early bearers in Gaelic sources, it may simply be the English name in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hewster was born in 1447, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, her father, Humphrey Hewster, was 27 and her mother, Joan de Burton, was 22. She married John Goring III in 1464, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1497, in London, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Duncton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Hewster est née en 1447, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Hewster, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Burton, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Goring III en 1464, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1497, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Duncton, Sussex, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hewster(이)가 1447년 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Hewster(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Burton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 John Goring III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 런던에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 던크턴에 묻혔다.

буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Burton, Sussex, England: буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Hewster родилась в 1447 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Hewster было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Burton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Goring III в 1464 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1497 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности дунктон, суссекс, Англия.
